name: Top 12 Hootsuite Competitors
description:
One of the big names in social media management, Hootsuite is used by tens of thousands of brands and agencies worldwide. But, as users of the platform may know, bigger isn’t always better. If you search the company’s G2 ratings, you’ll find complaints about:

  1. Hootsuite’s spotty customer service and support
  2. Lackluster reporting and analytics
  3. Frequent bugs and other reliability issues
  4. The lack of integrations
  5. The platform’s steep learning curve
  6. A cluttered user interface
  7. Unreasonably high pricing

Sheesh, no wonder you ended up looking for an alternative! Luckily, there are plenty of Hootsuite competitors that can give you the focused attention you deserve, with better pricing, stellar support, and platforms that don’t break every time the team makes an update.

Read on to find your next social media management tool!

‍
sections: synup-social-b; sprout-social-b; sendible-b; socialpilot-b; agorapulse-b; coschedule-b; socialbee-b
